films.title: The General
films.overview: During America’s Civil War, Union spies steal engineer Johnny Gray's beloved locomotive, 'The General'—with Johnnie's lady love aboard an attached boxcar—and he single-handedly must do all in his power to both get The General back and to rescue Annabelle.

films.title: Sherlock Jr.
films.overview: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meager skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.

films.title: Our Hospitality
films.overview: A young man falls for a young woman on his trip home; unbeknownst to him, her family has vowed to kill every member of his family.

films.title: The Cameraman
films.overview: A photographer takes up newsreel shooting to impress a secretary.

films.title: One Week
films.overview: Newlyweds receive a build-it-yourself house as a wedding gift—and the house can, supposedly, be built in "one week". A rejected suitor secretly re-numbers packing crates, and the husband struggles to assemble the house according to this new 'arrangement' of its parts.

films.title: The Navigator
films.overview: The wealthy and impulsive Rollo Treadway decides to propose to his beautiful socialite neighbor, Betsy O'Brien. Although Betsy turns Rollo down, he still opts to go on the cruise that he intended as their honeymoon. When circumstances find both Rollo and Betsy on the wrong ship, they end up having adventures on the high seas.

films.title: Seven Chances
films.overview: Struggling stockbroker Jimmie Shannon learns that, if he gets married by 7 p.m. on his 27th birthday -- which is today -- he'll inherit $7 million from an eccentric relative.

films.title: Steamboat Bill, Jr.
films.overview: The just-out-of-college, effete son of a no-nonsense steamboat captain comes to visit his father whom he's not seen since he was a child.

films.title: Limelight
films.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

films.title: Cops
films.overview: Buster Keaton gets involved in a series of misunderstandings involving a horse and cart. Eventually he infuriates every cop in the city when he accidentally interrupts a police parade.
